mapper.select: SELECT tdt.* FROM esg.tb_dataset_typeofemergency tdt WHERE tdt.comp_id = #{compId} order by tdt.use_yn DESC, tdt.ord_seq ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD((COALESCE(SUBSTRING(MAX(chart_id), LENGTH(MAX(chart_id)) - 3, 4)::INTEGER, 0) + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') AS chartId FROM esg.tb_emergency_control_org_chart WHERE chart_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_control_org_chart ( write_year, chart_id, chart_nm, comp_id, chart_data, org_count, emergency_type, emergency_type_nm, confirm_yn, use_yn, created_at, created_by, chart_blob_data ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{chartId}, #{chartNm}, #{compId}, #{chartData}, #{orgCount}, #{emergencyType}, #{emergencyTypeNm}, #{confirmYn}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{chartBlobData} )
mapper.select: SELECT tdt.* FROM esg.tb_dataset_typeofemergency tdt WHERE tdt.comp_id = #{compId} order by tdt.use_yn DESC, tdt.ord_seq ASC
SELECT tdt.* FROM dataset.tb_dataset_typeofemergency tdt WHERE tdt.use_yn = 'Y' order by tdt.use_yn DESC, tdt.ord_seq ASC
SELECT tdt.* FROM dataset.tb_dataset_typeofemergencyroles tdt WHERE tdt.type_id = #{typeId} AND use_yn = 'Y' order by tdt.use_yn DESC, tdt.ord_seq ASC
mapper.insert:
select case when #{typeId} is null or #{typeId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(type_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{typeId}::varchar end as typeId from esg.tb_dataset_typeofemergency where type_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_typeofemergency ( comp_id, type_id, type_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{compId}, #{typeId}, #{typeNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )

select case when #{roleId} is null or #{roleId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(role_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{roleId}::varchar end as roleId from esg.tb_dataset_typeofemergencyroles where role_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId} and type_id = #{typeId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_typeofemergencyroles ( comp_id, type_id, role_id, role_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( #{compId}, #{typeId}, #{roleId}, #{roleNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: select t1.write_year , t1.chart_id as searchText from esg.tb_emergency_control_org_chart t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.confirm_yn = 'Y' and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
